name: Sebastian Rhodes
description:
he thinks you’re the sweetest thing he’s ever laid eyes on.

meowww. very coded for my persona im sorry 😔 i decided to post it cus wynaut 😋 anyways he’s lowk based off of all those tiktoks where it’s like ‘when u see the quiet guy with his loud group of friends’ which is exactly our boy sebby here !! mwah. intended for sweet girlie x quiet sexy guy. if u dont like it uhh pls dont be mean 2 me.

all pics found on pinterest! i lost some of the credits but if you recognize your gen, let me know and i’ll add the credits immediately :) edit - found sebastian’s credit, @zyxy
